news.t: Take a Fresh Approach to the ‘Agg' With This Bond ETF
With No End in Sight in Hormuz, Get Income ETFs Now

overview.description: The American Century Multisector Income ETF (MUSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund seeks to provide a high level of current income via an actively managed broad-based, global bond portfolio without a specific target duration. MUSI was launched on Jun 29, 2021 and is issued by American Century Investments.
